Localization.Description: Banned file format in an email

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway deleted an email from {subject.account.contact} on host {src.host} to {object.account.contact} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway rejected an email from {subject.account.contact} on host {src.host} to {object.account.contact} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway deleted attachments in an email from {subject.account.contact} on host {src.host} to {object.account.contact} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Kaspersky Secure Mail Gateway skipped an email from {subject.account.contact} on host {src.host} to {object.account.contact} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
